article.title: Momentum Trade at New Extremes Is Drawing Wall Street Warnings
article.summary: The momentum trade — buy what’s winning, sell what isn’t — was already running red-hot heading into this week. Now a pause in the Iran war, strong US jobs data and another sharp rally in AI chips just piled on more fuel.
article.title_zh: 動量交易達新高度引發華爾街警告
article.summary_zh: 動量交易（買入領漲者，拋售落後者）已處於高溫狀態，伊朗戰爭暫停、美國就業數據向好和 AI 芯片再度大漲進一步推高交易熱度。

article.title: Court rules Trump's 10% tariff is just as illegal as the tariff it replaced
article.summary: The day after the Supreme Court struck down a set of Donald Trump's emergency tariffs , the president quickly imposed another, using a never-before-invoked provision of a decades-old trade law to order a global 10 percent tariff on most imports. Now, that second set of tariffs has been deemed illegal, and there are no more emergency levers that Trump can pull to try to replace them any time soon. That leaves Trump without much negotiation leverage a week before he's set to meet with China's President Xi Jinping , who already appeared to have the upper hand heading into talks. For Trump, when the US Court of International Trade invalidated his global tariffs, his key trade policy—which relies on imposing tariffs to supposedly drive more manufacturing into the US—was put at risk of being gut
article.title_zh: 法院裁定 Trump 10% 關稅與其替代的關稅同樣違法
article.summary_zh: 最高法院推翻 Trump 一套應急關稅後,他隨即基於數十年前的貿易法條款實施新的全球 10% 關稅,現已被法院判決為非法。

article.title: Engineers at NASA's Jet Propulsion Lab make a breakthrough in rotor technology
article.summary: A little more than three years since NASA's Ingenuity helicopter ended its pioneering mission at Mars, engineers at the Jet Propulsion Laboratory in California are designing next-generation Martian rotorcraft to carry heavier payloads longer distances through the planet's low-density atmosphere. Ingenuity was a resounding success , becoming the first airborne platform to explore another world. The dual-bladed helicopter made 72 flights, overachieving NASA's original goal of five flights over 30 days, after delivery to Mars by the Perseverance rover. By the time the mission ended with a crash-landing in January 2024, Ingenuity had shown scientists a new way to explore other worlds, using air to travel longer distances and reach locations inaccessible to ground vehicles. NASA plans to send t
article.title_zh: NASA 噴射推進實驗室工程師在轉子技術取得突破
article.summary_zh: 在 Ingenuity 直升機完成火星任務三年後,NASA 噴射推進實驗室正設計下一代火星旋翼機以承載更重的載荷。

article.title: Chinese grey market sells Claude API access at 90% off by using stolen credentials, model substitution, and harvesting users' prompts and outputs for resale as AI training data — 'transfer stations' operate through proxy networks that harvest user data
article.summary: A grey-market economy of API proxy services in China is reselling access to Anthropic's Claude models at as little as 10% of the official price.
article.title_zh: 中國灰市場以 90% 折扣銷售 Claude API 存取權，採用被盜認證、模型替換和收集使用者提示與輸出作為 AI 訓練資料轉售 — 「轉運站」透過代理網路運作並收集使用者資料
article.summary_zh: 中國灰市場 API 代理服務以官方價格 10% 的低價轉售 Anthropic Claude 模型的存取權。

article.title: Maryland citizens slapped with $2 billion grid upgrade bill for out-of-state AI data centers — state complains to federal energy regulators, says additional cost breaks ‘ratepayer protection pledge’ promises
article.summary: Maryland is complaining to the federal energy regulator about PJM's plan to charge it $2 billion for grid upgrades that will mostly benefit data centers, especially as the state claims that the majority of these developments are being built in neighboring regions.
article.title_zh: 馬里蘭州居民為州外 AI 資料中心承擔 20 億美元電網升級費用 — 州政府向聯邦能源監管機構投訴，稱額外費用違反「用戶保護承諾」
article.summary_zh: 馬里蘭州向聯邦能源監管機構投訴 PJM 計畫向該州收取 20 億美元電網升級費用，主要受益者為資料中心，且大部分開發項目位於鄰近地區。

article.title: Kenya Plans Taxes on Phones, Banking Fees to Raise $1 Billion
article.summary: Kenya plans taxes on mobile phones and banking fees to help raise nearly $1 billion in revenue in an effort to trim the nation’s fiscal deficit to its lowest in a decade and tackle debt challenges.
article.title_zh: 肯亞計畫對手機和銀行費用課稅以籌集 10 億美元
article.summary_zh: 肯亞計畫對行動電話和銀行費用課稅，以幫助籌集近 10 億美元收入，以期將該國財政赤字降至十年來最低，並應對債務挑戰。

article.title: FCC reverses course, allows software updates for foreign-made drones and routers until 2029 — agency says blocking security patches could create cybersecurity risks
article.summary: The FCC has extended waivers allowing certain covered foreign-produced drones, drone components, and routers to continue receiving software and firmware updates until at least 2029, citing cybersecurity and consumer protection concerns.
article.title_zh: FCC 改變立場，允許外製無人機和路由器進行軟體更新至 2029 年 — 機構表示阻止安全補丁可能造成網路安全風險
article.summary_zh: FCC 延長豁免期限，允許特定外製無人機、無人機零件和路由器繼續接收軟體和韌體更新至 2029 年，理由是基於網路安全和消費者保護考量。

article.title: Cloudflare cuts 20% of its jobs due to AI, and its stock takes a 19% spill — 1,100 jobs disappearing as company increased usage of AI sixfold over past months
article.summary: Cloudflare cuts 20% of its jobs due to AI, and its stock takes a 19% spill. The company announced it will be cutting 1,100 jobs and has increased its usage of AI sixfold over the past few months.
article.title_zh: Cloudflare 因 AI 裁員 20%，股價暴跌 19% — 公司裁減 1,100 個職位，過去數月 AI 使用量增加六倍
article.summary_zh: Cloudflare 宣佈裁員 1,100 人（佔員工總數 20%），股價下跌 19%，公司過去數月 AI 使用量增加六倍。

article.title: This is a beast of a rugged phone with extra features I actually use
article.summary: A modern mainstream phone will do just fine during outdoor adventures, but that doesn’t mean it’s the optimal tool for those who live and breathe adventure. This is why the rugged phone market remains so healthy in 2026. I haven’t delved into this niche category for a while, so getting the RugOne Xever 7 Pro in the mail was definitely a nice surprise. Especially now that I am more of an outdoor person. I live in a mountainous area surrounded by wilderness, often visit national parks, and have been camping more. Will the RugOne Xever 7 Pro become my go-to companion when I need my phone to keep up?
article.title_zh: 這是一款具有我真正使用的額外功能的強大堅固耐用手機
article.summary_zh: 主流手機在戶外冒險中表現不錯，但對於那些沉浸於冒險的人來說，堅固耐用手機是更優選擇，2026 年堅固耐用手機市場仍然健康。

article.title: Google’s not holding back on the color with Wallet’s bold new passes redesign
article.summary: TL;DR Google’s been working on a colorful new design for the interface you see when accessing your passes. Compared to our first look at this refresh, Google has now added even more color, as well as sorted out some irregular screen elements. We’re also seeing this new look in preparation for your Play Points balance. A bold design can go a long way towards enhancing an app’s usability. While an interface dominated by text and menus may feel like it offers the most utility, smart use of color and form can help make navigating even complicated apps feel like second nature. A little over a month ago, we took an early look at some of the ways Google Wallet was thinking about a colorful, bold upgrade for the way it worked with passes, and now we’ve got fresh progress to share. NEWSLETTER | Aut
article.title_zh: Google在Wallet的大膽新證件重新設計中毫不保留地運用色彩
article.summary_zh: Google正在為您存取證件時看到的介面設計大膽的新配色方案，並新增更多色彩和調整不規則的螢幕元素。

article.title: Switching to this carrier could cut my already affordable cellular plan in half
article.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority The current state of the economy is no joke. The rise in living costs means it’s the best time to strap in and start saving money wherever we can. One easy way to save hundreds (if not thousands) of dollars a year is to ditch your expensive phone plan. We’re not about to live without our phone plans, but you can definitely switch to something like Mint Mobile, which offers some of the best phone plans if you want to get top-quality service at a bargain.
article.title_zh: 轉換到此運營商可將我已經便宜的流動計劃減半
article.summary_zh: 當前經濟狀況並非玩笑，生活成本上升意味著現在是開始在任何地方節省開支的最佳時機，轉換手機計劃是節省數百至數千美元的簡單方法。

article.title: Here's the latest on US efforts to find spectrum for 6G
article.summary: NTIA shares progress on preparing spectrum for 6G with updates on work in 7GHz, 4GHz, 2.7GHz and 1.6GHz bands.
article.title_zh: 美國6G頻譜開發最新進展
article.summary_zh: NTIA分享了6G頻譜準備工作的進展，涵蓋7GHz、4GHz、2.7GHz和1.6GHz頻段的相關工作更新。

article.title: Telenor launches sovereign cloud venture in Norway
article.summary: Telenor said the platform will operate from nationally controlled data centers in Norway and will remain separated from commercial global cloud environments In sum – what to know: Sovereign cloud – Telenor is creating a standalone Norwegian cloud company focused…
article.title_zh: Telenor在挪威推出主權雲端服務
article.summary_zh: Telenor推出獨立的挪威雲端平台，將在受國家控制的本地數據中心運營，並與全球商業雲端環境完全分離。
